title: Fix mobile terminal vertical scroll; revert position:fixed
action: Revert .view-terminal from position:fixed/inset:0 back to a normal in-flow flex box (height:100%; min-height:0; overflow:hidden). Cap #app with height:100dvh + overflow:hidden (was min-height:100dvh, which grew with content and blocked internal scroll). Change .term-viewport .xterm height from 100% to max-content so the grid is its natural height and the viewport genuinely scrolls vertically. Add touch-action: pan-x pan-y to .term-viewport. Goal: recent history scrolls inside the viewport on real mobile without the position:fixed zoom/stiffness regression.

truths: No position:fixed on the terminal view
#app is height-capped so content scrolls internally not by stretching the page
xterm sizes to natural content height
prohibitions: Do not change TERMINAL_THEME or font size
Do not break the switcher/login layout

verify: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run

trace.outcome: Reverted position:fixed; #app height-capped + xterm natural height so the terminal scrolls internally on mobile without the zoom/stiffness regression
trace.verify_output: bundle ok; vitest 15 passed; cargo test + clippy clean. Headless: #app now height-capped (appH 844, not stretching), viewport canScroll true (783<1038), scroll-to-top reveals earliest lines, switcher still renders.
trace.verify_command: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run
